**What is the principle?**
(one sentence)

**Why does it matter?**
(what it fixes on a landing or sales page)

**How to check it on a page?**
(1 to 3 actionable items)

**Source / reference**
(a study, book, or recognized author — no source, no entry)

**Suggested category**
Clarity · Conversion · Visual hierarchy · Trust · Persuasion · Content · Speed · Accessibility
